Product.title: Product
Product.description: An inventory item in the stock registry.

id.description: Product SKU or database barcode ID containing only alphanumeric characters, dashes, and underscores.

name.description: Highly visible name of the inventory product.

category.description: Categoric bin (e.g., Alimentos, Eletrônicos, Escritório, etc.).

quantity.description: Strictly non-negative integer representing current stock.

minQuantity.description: Safety threshold causing triggers and push notices when actual stock falls short.

price.description: Unit physical value of the product.

location.description: The shelf-rack or warehouse department positioning.

description.description: Detailed notes on features, parts, or specifications.

updatedBy.description: Display name of the modifier user.

Transaction.title: Transaction
Transaction.description: Audit record tracking product flow events (IN, OUT, ADJUST).

productId.description: SKU code linking back to the parent Product.

type.description: Stock flow direction: entry (IN), exit (OUT), or manual calibration (ADJUST).

quantityChanged.description: Relative difference of quantity added or removed.

previousQuantity.description: Active quantity prior to the change.

userDisplayName.description: Display Name of the acting user.

products/{productId}.description: Shared real-time inventory collection of physical items.

transactions/{transactionId}.description: Incremental historical timeline of stock updates accessed by team members.
